title: You Wouldn't Put Gunpowder In A Furnace
description: Smelting gunpowder causes it to explode.
body:
![You wouldn't put gunpowder in a furnace.](https://github.com/krypt0graphy/exploding-furnace/blob/1.20.1/putgunpowder.png?raw=true)

Smelting gunpowder causes it to become explosive, picking it up or putting it in your inventory makes it explode.
